agents.backstory_hint: Tech-savvy specialist who manages hardware and system access with precision.
agents.goal: Ensure all physical hardware and software access is provisioned correctly for the new hire.

agents.backstory_hint: Highly organized administrator focused on employee experience and clear documentation.
agents.goal: Ensure smooth communication and manager preparedness for the new hire.

agents.backstory_hint: Detail-oriented observer who cross-references systems to identify gaps.
agents.goal: Verify that all onboarding steps were successfully completed and report discrepancies.

assumptions: The provisioning tool correctly identifies the team's stack (Engineering vs Sales) based on input data.
The 'few days before' timing is defined as 3 business days prior to the start date.
The audit happens exactly 7 days after the start date.

tasks.description: Order the new hire's laptop and configure necessary accounts for email, Slack, and team-specific software (Engineering vs Sales stack).
tasks.expected_output: Confirmation report of hardware orders and created system accounts.

tasks.description: Send a welcome email a few days prior to the start date containing arrival logistics, meeting details, and start time.
tasks.expected_output: Welcome communication delivered to the new hire.

tasks.description: Generate an intro-meeting checklist document for the manager to use during the new hire's first week.
tasks.expected_output: A structured checklist document for the manager.

tasks.description: One week after the start date, query the HRIS and internal systems to verify account access and equipment arrival; flag any outstanding items.
tasks.expected_output: An exception report highlighting missing assets or account access.

tools.name: HRIS Query Tool
tools.purpose: Access employee data and department-specific information from the HR system.

tools.name: Multi-channel Notifier
tools.purpose: Send welcome emails and internal notifications via Slack and email.

tools.name: Document Builder
tools.purpose: Generate the manager's first-week checklist document.

workflow.description: Standardize the onboarding process by automating equipment ordering, account provisioning, welcome communications, and manager checklist creation, followed by a post-onboarding audit.
workflow.name: Employee Onboarding Automation
workflow.trigger: HR provides a new hire's start date.
